entities.goals_summary:
# A2Z Equity Goals

## Q2 2026
- 3+ vetted investment opportunities in pipeline
- $500k+ raised this round
- Investor pitch deck template that can be reused per opportunity

## Q3 2026
- First returns reported to investors with professional reporting
- 5+ vetted opportunities in active pipeline
- New investor channels beyond existing network

# ApexMedLaw Goals

## Q2 2026
- Critical care branch live with dedicated physician pipeline
- At least 1 case placed through CC branch
- Unified branding and website for multi-specialty offering

## Q3 2026
- 3+ specialty branches active
- Shared law firm relationships generating cross-specialty referrals
- GI branch formalized with dedicated pipeline

# Cason Plastic Surgery — Goals

## Month 1 (Launch)
- Website live and indexed by Google
- Google Business Profile claimed and optimized
- Twitter/X account active with 15+ published tweets
- Instagram content strategy defined (complement existing @drrogercason)
- First blog post published (SEO target: "best plastic surgeon Dallas")
- Practice branding finalized (logo, colors, business cards)

## Month 2 (Build Presence)
- 500 Twitter/X followers
- 3 blog posts live targeting local SEO keywords

# Club Haus Goals

## Q2 2026
- Website live
- Square POS configured and tested
- First barbers onboarded with documented process
- Interior design finalized with team input via whiteboard tool

## Q3 2026
- Grand opening
- Steady booking flow through online scheduling
- Social media presence active (Instagram, TikTok)

# NLC Goals

## Q2 2026
- 8+ cases/month (from 3-4)
- 2+ new large law firm relationships
- Case management dashboard demo-ready for in-person law firm meetings
- Active social media presence: daily LinkedIn, 3x/week Instagram and Threads
- 5+ new physicians recruited to roster

## Q3 2026
- 15+ cases/month
- 10+ physicians on roster across neuro specialties
- AI-generated content pipeline running with minimal human review
- Inbound leads from social media and website

# Porcupine Edu Goals

## Month 1
- Website live with 10+ pages of educational content
- T-shirt store integrated with print-on-demand provider
- Google Search Console and Analytics configured
- Initial social media presence (Instagram, Pinterest)

## Month 3
- 20+ SEO-optimized articles published
- First page rankings for 5+ porcupine-related keywords
- First T-shirt sales

## Month 6
- #1 position for primary keywords
- 10k+ monthly organic visitors
- Consistent merch sales

# Titan Renovations Goals

## Q3 2026
- Professional website live with service descriptions and contact form
- Invoicing system set up (Square or WaveApps)
- First inbound leads from web presence
- Google Business Profile optimized

priorities:
# Priorities (Updated 2026-03-14)

## Tier 1: Revenue Now
1. **NLC lead generation** - More cases, bigger law firms, more physicians. Social media + LinkedIn outreach + content marketing.
2. **NLC internal tools** - Get the case management dashboard production-ready for in-person marketing to law firms.
3. **A2Z Equity growth** - Find investment opportunities, create investor pitches, expand investor base beyond friends and family. Target: significantly exceed $250k raised last year.

## Tier 2: Launch and Build
4. **ApexMedLaw expansion** - Critical care branch with the CC doc, then more specialties. Each gets its own pipeline.
5. **Club Haus setup** - Website prototype, Square integration, scheduling, onboarding docs, interior design tools, team whiteboard/webapp.

## Tier 3: Structure and Scale
6. **Titan Renovations** - Website, invoicing, basic business structure.
7. **Tool internalization** - Replace or AI-augment WaveApps, reduce dependency on external tools.

goals:
# Goals (Derived from Priorities)

## Q2 2026
- NLC: 8+ cases/month (up from 3-4). At least 2 new large law firm relationships.
- NLC: Internal dashboard demo-ready for law firm meetings.
- A2Z: Identify 3+ investment opportunities. Raise $500k+ this round.
- ApexMedLaw: Critical care branch live with dedicated pipeline.
- Club Haus: Website live, Square POS configured, first barbers onboarded.

## Q3 2026
- NLC: 15+ cases/month with 10+ physicians on roster.
- A2Z: First returns reported to investors. Pipeline of 5+ vetted opportunities.
- Titan Renovations: Website, invoicing, first inbound leads from web.
- Dashboard: Personal life management pages active for Abhi and Ovi.

## Ongoing
- Reduce Abhi's meeting hours by 50% through AI-driven feedback loops.
- Every entity has automated content pipelines running.
- System self-improves weekly based on approval data.
